testsuite.name: Класс Тестов на регистрацию нового пользователя
testsuite.system-err: [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.impl.WebDriverThreadLocalContainer - No webdriver is bound to current thread: 1 - let's create a new webdriver [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.impl.FileHelper - Creating folder: C:\AQA\AQA-start\build\downloads\1776725480622_3984_1 апр. 21, 2026 1:51:23 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 апр. 21, 2026 1:51:23 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.167. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
